Background: A senior agent of the Drunken Crow Information Guild. She is Minari's strongest agent as well as a childhood friend. She is the older twin sister of Ruras. In her childhood, her village was destroyed by a mad wizard and his corrupt knights. She escaped along with her brother and Minari thanks to the fortunate intervention of a rogue golem soldier. The covert operations executed by Sena and her brother helped propel the Drunken Crow to it's current standing. Enjoys meat and violence.
